mission.title: grpc: [Python] GRPC server blocked when restarted in loop.
mission.description: [Python] GRPC server blocked when restarted in loop.. This issue affects 20+ users.

steps.title: Identify grpc troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your grpc setup:
gRPC library — check your language-specific package (e.g., pip show grpcio, npm ls @grpc/grpc-js)
Check your build output and test logs for errors related to this issue.

steps.title: Review grpc configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant grpc configuration:
### What version of gRPC and what language are you using?
Python3.7
```
grpcio==1.51.3
grpcio-health-checking==1.51.3
grpcio-reflection==1.51.3
```
pip

steps.title: Apply the fix for [Python] GRPC server blocked when restarted in loop.
steps.description:
Hi  , sorry for the delay and thanks for the test! Looks like this happens for non-async client and server too, I created a Bazel test [here](https://github.com/XuanWang-Amos/grpc/blob/fixit_JinaHanging/src/python/grpcio_tests/tests/unit/_jina_hanging_test.py) to help debug.

This is the command
```yaml
grpcio==1.51.3
grpcio-health-checking==1.51.3
grpcio-reflection==1.51.3
```

steps.title: Confirm [Python] GRPC server blocked when restarted in… is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
Test grpc to confirm the issue is resolved.
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.

resolution.summary: Hi  , sorry for the delay and thanks for the test! Looks like this happens for non-async client and server too, I created a Bazel test [here](https://github.com/XuanWang-Amos/grpc/blob/fixit_JinaHanging/src/python/grpcio_tests/tests/unit/_jina_hanging_test.py) to help debug.
